from state_machine_trading import run_trading_simulation
from plotting.battery_plot import plot_battery_trading
from utils.bess_simulator import BESS_SIZE
import os; os.makedirs\('plots', exist_ok=True\)

# Test 1: solar + load
r = run_trading_simulation\(
    optimise_thresholds=False, plot=False, verbose=False,
    train_solar_csv='data/solar_JAN26.csv', train_load_csv='data/load_JAN26.csv',
    test_solar_csv='data/solar_FEB26.csv',  test_load_csv='data/load_FEB26.csv',
\)
plot_battery_trading\(r['results_df'], output_path='plots/test_solar_load.html',
    bess_size=BESS_SIZE, buy_threshold=r['buy_threshold'],
    sell_threshold=r['sell_threshold'], show_plot=False\)
print\('Solar+load plot: OK'\)

# Test 2: arbitrage only
r2 = run_trading_simulation\(optimise_thresholds=False, plot=False, verbose=False\)
plot_battery_trading\(r2['results_df'], output_path='plots/test_arbitrage.html',
    bess_size=BESS_SIZE, buy_threshold=r2['buy_threshold'],
    sell_threshold=r2['sell_threshold'], show_plot=False\)
print\('Arbitrage-only plot: OK'\)
